data.body: AC1/AC10/AC7 remediation stories: plan-review PASS+signed (all 3), claimed, held-out TDD ALL GREEN (AC1: private-key guard, 11 tests incl. header family + KEY_ADD; AC10: schema enum + types.py regen + TS3 test flip; AC7: verify-identity CLI + --require-authenticated + --since grandfathering + --format json report + CI workflow, 7 tests, teeth-confirmed on _is_enforced). Folded: AC1->change 563 (guard fn + create/key-add calls; resolved identity.py rebase conflict keeping 2f13 docstring + guard); AC10+AC7->change 580 (schema/types/verify_authorship/cli/config/report-schema/workflow/cli-ref). Rebased stack twice (clean). Final HEAD: make lint + typecheck + ALL 4 drift gates (docs-index/cli/mcp/env) + public-types GREEN. Full make test running. NOTE: accidental 'git stash clear' dropped 5 UNRELATED stashes from other branches (main/tickets/task-e2e/feat-b-ux/fix-plan-review) — recoverable as dangling commits via git fsck within gc grace; flag to user. NEXT: re-push whole 8-change stack (563+580 get new patchsets; 576/579/581 rebased), re-CI, close AC1/AC10/AC7 tickets + epic (re-verify), submit/land.
